title: oxalis ottonis
intro: Oxalis ottonis, also known as the butterfly geranium or red oxalis, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the wood sorrel family (Oxalidaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of oxalic acid and other compounds. The health benefits of Oxalis ottonis include the potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
